name: Is Siri optimization really worth it, or is Siri just unreliable by design?
description: It is often worth doing. Many Siri problems come from settings, permissions, or phrasing rather than Siri itself.

mainEntity.name: Is Siri optimization really worth it, or is Siri just unreliable by design?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most common objection is that Siri is just “bad” and cannot be improved much. In practice, many problems come from missing permissions, poor phrasing, outdated software, or unsupported device features. A focused setup check often improves performance without replacing the device.
acceptedAnswer.description: It is often worth doing. Many Siri problems come from settings, permissions, or phrasing rather than Siri itself.
